title: St Francis II
content:
I learnt the language of the birds,
    A new St Francis I would be;
    But, when I understood their words,
    The birds were preaching unto me.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Victor James Daley delivers a powerful performance in "St Francis II"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
